assertions.description: The allowResponsiveSizing IDL attribute is defined on HTMLIFrameElement.
The allowResponsiveSizing property on an iframe is a boolean.
assertions.test: (() => { const f = document.createElement('iframe'); return typeof f.allowResponsiveSizing === 'boolean'; })()

assertions.description: The default value of allowResponsiveSizing on a new iframe is false.
assertions.test: (() => { const f = document.createElement('iframe'); return f.allowResponsiveSizing === false; })()

assertions.description: The allowResponsiveSizing IDL property reflects the content attribute correctly.
assertions.test: (() => { const f = document.createElement('iframe'); f.setAttribute('allow-responsive-sizing', ''); return f.allowResponsiveSizing === true; })()
